title: Haier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Haier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Haier India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Haier India:
Haier India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
